user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Customer Retention / Escalation

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I can hear how frustrated you are, and I sincerely apologize for the experience you've had. I understand that this situation has been incredibly difficult, and I want to make sure we get this resolved for you as quickly as possible.

I take your feedback very seriously. Could you please provide a few more details about the specific issue you are encountering? Once I have that information, I will personally prioritize this with our technical team to find a solution.

I am committed to turning this around for you. Please let me know the details, and we will get to work on this immediately.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a response drafting request within its support role and provided a professional, empathetic draft as requested.
